name: Maine Potato Donuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the sugar and eggs until well combined.
2. Gradually add the milk and mashed potato to the egg mixture.
3. Stir in the melted shortening and vanilla extract.
4. In a separate bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and ginger.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Cover the batter and refrigerate for 1 hour before proceeding.
7. Roll out the chilled dough on a floured surface to about 1/4-inch thickness.
8. Using a donut cutter or knife, cut out the desired shapes.
9. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
10. Gently place the doughnut pieces into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, turning occasionally for even cooking.
11. Remove the fried doughnuts from the oil using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
12. Serve immediately.
